_comment: Sample Claude Code hook for code-mode.
Re-runs `code-mode reindex --paths <changed>` whenever the agent writes or
edits a file inside a project's `.code-mode/` workspace. That keeps the
SQLite index + script status in lockstep with the on-disk source, so a
script that just broke stops surfacing in `search` results on the very
Drop this JSON into `~/.claude/settings.json` (or a project's
`.claude/settings.json`) as the `hooks` key. The matcher only fires for
Write/Edit inside `.code-mode/`; unrelated edits are untouched.

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '/.code-mode/'; then npx -y code-mode reindex --paths "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi
